rationale: Educ. Code §13.004 governs allocation of indebtedness and personal property among school districts during annexation or abolition. It does not reference homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no conflict arises.
quote: In allocating the indebtedness and personal property, the commissioners court shall consider the value of the properties involved and the taxable value of the districts involved.
_note: No direct conflict; §13.004 addresses district reorganization debt allocation, not homestead exemption levels.
